user.title: IMAP Connection
user.description: Configure the IMAP server that receives your Garmin LiveTrack notification emails.

person.title: Add Tracked Person
person.description:
Add the first person to monitor. You can add more later in the integration options.

The **full name** must match exactly what appears in the Garmin LiveTrack email body.
The **entity prefix** is used to create entity IDs (e.g. 'john' → sensor.garmin_livetrack_john).

error.imap_dns_error: Could not resolve the IMAP server hostname. Check the server address for typos.
error.imap_connection_error: Could not connect to the IMAP server. It may be offline, behind a firewall, or the port may be wrong.
error.imap_tls_error: SSL/TLS handshake failed. Check the port (usually 993) and that the server supports implicit SSL.
error.imap_auth_error: IMAP login was rejected. Check the username and password. For Gmail, use an App Password instead of your normal password.
error.imap_folder_error: The IMAP folder could not be opened. Check that the folder name exists (default: INBOX).
error.imap_unknown_error: IMAP test failed with an unexpected error. See the Home Assistant logs for details.
error.invalid_prefix: Entity prefix must contain only letters, numbers, and underscores.
error.duplicate_prefix: This entity prefix is already in use.

abort.already_configured: This IMAP account is already configured.
